entries.title: Initial build of Zetra ID app
entries.content:
- Flutter app 'Zetra ID' built from scratch.
- Features 3 screens: Entry (ID generation), ID Display (with copy), and Inbox (read-only list).
- Persists ID using flutter_secure_storage.
- Backend: https://zetra-backend.onrender.com
- Package name: com.zetrasystems.zetraid
- No complex state management used (setState only).

entries.title: API Integration & UI Refresh
entries.content: Updated Flutter app to integrate with new /api/identity/create and /api/identity/:zetra_id/messages endpoints. Added date formatting, logout (reset) capability, and UI refinements.
